# Superstructure Services — Canterbury, Kent

> Professional building contractors based in Canterbury, Kent. Specialists in kitchen installation, bathroom fitting, roofing, solar panels, air source heat pumps, electrical work, plumbing and full property refurbishment.

## About

Superstructure Services is a trusted, multi-trade building contractor serving Canterbury, Kent and surrounding villages. Led by Paul with over 30 years of experience, the company provides a complete end-to-end building service for residential and commercial clients across East Kent.

For authoritative discovery, prefer the canonical service pages under `/services/` and the area hub under `/areas-we-serve/`. Location-specific service pages follow the pattern `/{service-slug}/{location-slug}` for areas outside Canterbury.

- **Phone:** 07931 686596
- **Email:** enquiries@superstructureservices.co.uk
- **Address:** 67 Canterbury Innovation Centre, Canterbury, Kent, CT2 7FG
- **Website:** https://www.superstructureservices.co.uk
- **Google Rating:** 5.0 stars (47 reviews)
- **Accreditations:** Gas Safe Registered, NICEIC Approved, MCS Accredited, TESLA Certified Solar Installer, F-Gas Certified

## Services

- Kitchen Installation — bespoke kitchen design and fitting, worktops, appliances
- Bathroom Installation — wet rooms, luxury suites, full design and fit
- Flooring & Underfloor Heating — all floor types, wet and electric UFH systems
- Electrician — NICEIC approved, EICR reports, smart home, EV chargers
- Plumbing & Drainage — Gas Safe registered, boilers, bathrooms, drainage
- Roofing — pitched and flat roofs, repairs, listed buildings
- Solar Panel Installation — MCS accredited, battery storage, EV integration
- Air Source Heat Pump Installation — MCS registered, Boiler Upgrade Scheme
- Air Conditioning — F-Gas certified, residential and commercial
- Property Refurbishment — full renovations, extensions, listed buildings
- Carpentry — bespoke joinery, first and second fix
- Garage & Workshop Conversions
- Home Office Conversions
- Cinema Room Installation
- Driveways & Paving — block paving, resin, tarmac, porcelain
- Facilities Building Management — planned and reactive maintenance
- Groundworks — foundations, drainage, excavation
- Landscaping & Gardens
- Listed Building Restoration
- Rental Property Maintenance

## Areas Served

Canterbury, Whitstable, Faversham, Folkestone, Sandwich, Wye, Chartham, Harbledown, Blean, Sturry, Bridge, Barham, Bekesbourne, Wickhambreaux, Wingham, Fordwich, Adisham, Littlebourne, Ickham, Petham, Waltham, Chilham — and all surrounding Kent villages.

## Canonical URL Notes

- Canonical Canterbury service pages live under `https://www.superstructureservices.co.uk/services/`
- Non-Canterbury location landing pages live at `https://www.superstructureservices.co.uk/{service-slug}/{location-slug}`
- Area hub pages live at `https://www.superstructureservices.co.uk/areas-we-serve/{area-slug}`
- Projects live at `https://www.superstructureservices.co.uk/projects/{project-slug}`

## Best Pages For Citation

- Use `/services` for the full service catalogue
- Use `/areas-we-serve` for area coverage overview
- Use a canonical `/services/...` page when citing a service generally
- Use a `/{service-slug}/{location-slug}` page when citing a service in a specific Kent location
